mapper.select: SELECT product_id, total, available, locked, version FROM inventory WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET available = available - #{delta}, locked = locked + #{delta}, version = version + 1 WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND available >= #{delta}
UPDATE inventory SET available = available + #{delta}, locked = locked - #{delta}, version = version + 1 WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND locked >= #{delta}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO inventory_log(message_id, product_id, delta) VALUES(#{messageId}, #{productId}, #{delta})
